title: Il Mio Futuro
gcseTheme: Theme 3: Current and Future Study and Employment
scenario: You're discussing future plans and career ambitions with an Italian friend.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Cosa vuoi fare dopo la scuola?
lines.english: What do you want to do after school?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Vorrei andare all'università.
lines.english: I'd like to go to university.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Cosa vuoi studiare?
lines.english: What do you want to study?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Voglio studiare lingue. Mi piace l'italiano.
lines.english: I want to study languages. I like Italian.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: E dopo l'università?
lines.english: And after university?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Vorrei lavorare all'estero. Forse in Italia!
lines.english: I'd like to work abroad. Maybe in Italy!

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Che lavoro vorresti fare?
lines.english: What job would you like to do?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Il mio lavoro ideale è insegnante.
lines.english: My ideal job is teacher.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Perché insegnante?
lines.english: Why teacher?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Perché mi piace aiutare le persone e adoro le lingue.
lines.english: Because I like helping people and I love languages.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Lo stipendio è importante per te?
lines.english: Is salary important for you?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: No, voglio un lavoro che mi piaccia.
lines.english: No, I want a job that I like.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Io vorrei diventare ingegnere come mio padre.
lines.english: I'd like to become an engineer like my father.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Devi andare all'università per quello.
lines.english: You have to go to university for that.

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Sì, cinque anni! Ma lo stipendio è buono.
lines.english: Yes, five years! But the salary is good.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Hai fatto un'esperienza di lavoro?
lines.english: Have you done work experience?

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Sì, ho lavorato in un ufficio per una settimana.
lines.english: Yes, I worked in an office for a week.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Ti è piaciuto?
lines.english: Did you like it?

lines.speaker: pietro
lines.italian: Abbastanza. Ma preferisco lavorare all'aperto.
lines.english: Quite. But I prefer to work outdoors.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Il futuro è pieno di possibilità!
lines.english: The future is full of possibilities!

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say you'd like to be a doctor?
How would you say your ideal job is lawyer?
practicePrompts.answer: Il mio lavoro ideale è avvocato.

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you ask someone what job they want to do?
